      "category": "address_extreme",
      "test_code": "function test_RevertWhen_transferToZeroAddress() public { SimpleToken token = new SimpleToken(1000); vm.expectRevert('zero address'); token.transfer(address(0), 100); }",
      "expected_behavior": "revert with 'zero address'",
      "real_world_exploit": "Tokens sent to zero address lost forever"
    },

      "expected_behavior": "success, emit Transfer event with value 0",
      "real_world_exploit": "No direct harm, gas waste possible"
    },
